title: Run! Gross
text: Absolutely not! I don’t know what in the fake type of meat this is. But ewww.

title: Absolutely NO.
text: If I could give this 0 stars, I would. The meat texture was like old grey ground beef and it smelled horrible. We finished making it but couldn’t bring ourselves to eat it because it look like old sick cow. NOTHING LIKE THE PICTURE ON FRONT OF PACKAGE.
Tastes like beef jerky, very expensive for the quality or size.

title: Gross, go with the chicken
text: I have had other Kevin’s meals and generally found they are not the most flavorful but I like the ingredients and that it’s a convenience item that still falls Within how I choose to eat. When I saw the reviews I ignored them because sometimes choosing health doesn’t taste as flavorful but if it is fueling your body and half decent, sometimes that’s good enough for a busy working mom…This meal on the other hand was so god awful I feel like it should never have made it past R&D testing. I would liken the texture to one big dog food clump and the steak tastes like it came from a can (not su vide

title: Beef in a bag is boring
text: Sorry but souse veide or however you spell it is boring if you don’t get the seared edges and parts for flavor. I was hoping I wouldn’t have to mess with browning everything delicately as the meat is already almost cooked. Too prone to getting overdone when I do toss it in a pan. Sauce is bland. I doubt I will buy this or any of the others I purchased again. None have been winners! Do not pay fill price for these as often on sale for $8-9 on sale.
Fresh delicious and quick! Recommend for a quick dinner!

title: Not great.
text: Very tough to chew- which is weird when it’s sou vide! Gravy tastes like a mix. Not something I would recommend or purchase again unfortunately.

title: I approve
text: In the process of preparation to the final product it looks like dog food, but it delivers on a pretty good taste. Im not mad at it.

title: Yum!
text: Could be a bit more tenderized. And a little more flavor. Loved a lot of gravy which was amazing. You could taste some flavor. A great size for two people. Doesn’t take long to heat up.

title: Mars Co. bought them out and ruined a good quality meal.
text: Being a family who has celiac with lactose intolerance we have always loved Kevin's Meals. Unfortunately, over the past two years, the quality of Kevin's meals have significantly decreased. Not only are the portions smaller, the quality of meat has significantly declined all while the prices went from $7.99 to a whopping $12.99. This last meal was total junk. Meat was truly awful, chewy, stringy. Most the sauce evaporated. Just junk. Low amd behold, after some research, I found Mars Corp acquired them back in 2023. THIS EXPLAINS SOOOO MUCH. Everything that company you hes, turns to crap..and t

title: Below average flavor, but good quality meat
text: Sauce flavor was rated poorly, while the beef was described as tender and juicy.
Don't care for the prep or how much extra steps and PLASTIC this is packed in
Good for the value!
Terrible taste and smell. Several pieces were too hard to eat, and others were chewy and gummy from fat. Terrible!!
Ugh. Not worth it.
Beef tips nastiest inedible bits of scraps,Don’t buy!Publix has large pieces of tender beef microwaveable fuss-free. No scraps!

Absolutely disgusting. I was getting food poisoning just looking at it. My brother asked if I’m cooking dog food.

title: Bland

title: Not good
text: I prepared these steak tips exactly as the directions suggested, but they were awful. The meat was chewy, fatty, & tough. I would put a piece in my mouth & attempt to chew it & had to spit it out. Also, the gravy was overly salty. Would not buy again.

title: I would never buy this again
text: Yuck meat had a strange texture not good quality meat didn’t even eat it. I usually buy small farmed meat though so maybe it’s just me.

title: Not good

title: All fat and nasty

title: Literally looks like dog food

title: Its edible but not worth full price
text: I only bought this because it was discounted down to $3.30 and wanted to try it without paying full price. The meat looks like chunks of ground beef. It tasted fine and the gravy had a tasty but not worth the full price.

title: eeeYUCKKK

title: Fake Terikayi, but who even asked for that?
text: Admittedly, it’s on me not noticing that this is sold as fake Teriyaki. But man, it does not taste like Teriyaki. That aside, it’s still a poor product. Small quantity for the price. Sauce takes really fake and artificial. Stringy and tough meat without any meaty flavor.

title: Tough

title: Dont recommend

title: product unsatisfactory
text: Dislike too expensive for amount. Meat was tender not much flavor. Gravy had a artificial taste. Will not buy again.

title: decent but not great. pricey.
text: this is good for an easy quick meal. the meat is cooked sous vide so it looks weird when you take it out of the package. the taste is good, but the cut of the meat is not good. decent meal but not buying again.

title: Disgusting!
text: If I could give zero I would I bet cat food tastes better expired same day that I bought it but it shouldn’t matter the taste look smell everything was off! So expensive for no reason
The cheap beef used in this is both soggy and dry at the same time. The sauce has a hint of ginger but otherwise a generic brown sauce, but at least it’s better than the beef. Wouldn’t buy again.

title: Absolutely not....
text: Looked and tasted Iike dog food. Will never purchase again

title: Deceiving - NOT 1lb
text: Flavor ok but 10 oz total with sauce and meat. Had to make a second dinner to feed whole family. Will not buy this or from this brand again.
Looks and taste like dog food.

title: GROSS
text: Lacks flavor too much work.

Truly disgusting.  The meat is one ugly lump in a bag of brown water. Looks like a liver. (I learned this is a French method of cooking where food is vacuum-sealed in a bag and cooked in a water bath. It's called "sous vide.") In any case this lump of meat is a turn off and the idea that you can "Break beef strips apart by massaging pouch before opening." is a joke. Impossible. What you get is odd-sized chunks that are not strips. I wanted to throw the whole mess in the trash, but for $15 that seemed wasteful. I sauteed the chunks as directed, took one bite of tough meat and then threw it all away.  There are far better beef ready-meals than this horrible mess.

title: DO NOT BUY
text: There’s no way this is actual meat. It looks NOTHING like the picture, it’s literally just a blob of gray…. Wet cat food looking something 🤢

title: Positive review
text: Positive overall experience.
I went to cook this and it looks so gross I just threw it away.

title: Too expensive for the portion size
text: We have enjoyed other meals by this company so we gave this a shot. It’s quite expensive for the portion size. The flavor is pretty good but it claims to serve 6, we bought two packages, and it served 3 of us.

title: AVOID WAY TOO SWEET
text: WAY TOO SWEET: triggering an insulin spike with that WAY TOO SWEET OF TASTE: per serving 7G total carbs, 3g added sugar: coconut nectar, coconut sugar, tapioca starch, and monk fruit
No sesame SEED OILS for me, thank you!

title: Delicious!
text: So delicious!! And very easy to make, new staple in our house for sure!

title: Disappointing

Pretty good but it is salty and so very expensivep

title: No
text: It tastes and smells EXACTLY like how I would imagine a can of wet dog food does
I didn’t enjoy it.

title: Worst meal ever.
text: This was the worst meal I ever had. I usually don’t write reviews but I really don’t want anyone to experience this meal like I did. First of all, when I opened it, it did not look appetizing. Second, I went to culinary school & I know how to cook.. this was the toughest & most flavorless sirloin steak tips. It didn’t even look close to the photo. I was literally so sad cause I needed a quick & ready to go meal.. never again.
The meats is chewy and the gravy taste almost plastic

Eeeeeuuuuwwww.  The beef actually smelled OK in the pan when following the heating instructions even though it fell out of the souvide bag as a gray clump.  The sauce ruined everything.  YUCK.  It was an overly sweet syrupy “soy free” sauce.  Think…Asian food without soy sauce?  Like thickened sugar water…..Terrible….  The beef was shoe leather tough.  Disappointing as I really enjoyed the Thai chicken meal.

title: Great taste, beef tender but full of gristle
text: Love the taste, but 75% minimum of beef was filled with gristle.

title: Love it
text: Love this brand. Tasty. Convenient.
If you can’t eat soy, this is amazing!  And it’s So delicious regardless!  Easy to prepare and really satisfies the craving for Asian cuisine!

title: Bad texture and taste
text: I like their chicken products and thought I’d give the beef a try. The texture wasn’t what I expected and many pieces were stringy and hard to chew. I expected something tender given its sous vide style of cooking. The flavor was a bit off. Some pieces weren’t terrible while others had a strange flavor. I ended up eating only a few pieces and threw it away.

title: Do Not Buy
text: Two thumbs down for taste and value. Literally took one bite and threw it away.

title: This one is not very good
text: This beef had a gamey flavor that I didn’t enjoy not even the sauce saved it. I threw it in the trash.

title: Positive review
text: Positive overall experience.

title: Total weight includes outer packaging
text: Flavor is fine - meat is okay, a bit tough unless you cut it just right. My problem is the package says 16oz but that weight includes the tray and outer cardboard. The meat weighs about 8oz and the sauce pack weighs about 5oz. Add back the outer packaging and it’s 15.8oz.

title: Not beef tips!!
text: I received ground beef, not beef tips.

title: Positive review
text: Positive overall experience.

title: Sirloin steak taste
text: Good portion and pretty good taste.

title: Tough Meat
text: Fatty meat Could not chew or swallow Very Tough

title: Tough, Unappetizing, and Not Worth the Price
text: I wish I had read the reviews before buying this. The beef looked unappealing straight out of the package — the color was off and reminded me of canned dog food. The cooking instructions didn’t inspire confidence, and unfortunately, the results matched my concerns. The meat was incredibly tough and rubbery, making it unpleasant to chew. I even tried simmering it a little longer in a reduced sauce to soften and salvage it, but it was still nearly inedible. The flavor is mediocre at best, and the quality of the beef is poor. For the price, this is a major disappointment. Buyer beware.

title: Review
text: Purchased on 7/18/2025. It had a use or freeze date of 7/10/2025 on it at time of purchase.

title: Terrible!
text: Prepared according to package directions. Meat was a little gristly, and smelled weird, kind of raw, but I figured that was because it was precooked sous vide. Added sauce as directed at the end of cooking. No flavor, except a weird, off-putting tang. The meat itself was tough, and the gravy didn’t have any flavor either. Threw away, which angers me because I don’t like to waste food or money. Can’t believe that trash was $13!!!

title: Soooo nasty!
text: 0 out of 10. Do not recommend
The sauce is good, but I found the beef tough and laden with gristle, poor quality.  I would not buy this again.

title: Expensive and not great
text: Taste and smells like dog food. I was super excited about this one bc I do enjoy an occasional Kevin’s meal but it was such a disappointment. The chicken ones they have are much better (for microwave food).

title: Do not buy you will be disappointed
text: Texture was not like sirloin steak definitely like liver my dog enjoyed it

title: Off tasting meat
text: Quite a lot of meat in the package but the flavor was almost like liver. Would not purchase again.

title: Good with veg & rice
text: I added an entire chopped zucchini, half a bag of steamed broccoli, onion, and a handful of sliced sweet peppers... there was enough sauce to coat everything!!! I only added salt & pepper when sautéed the veggies, the sauce packet took care of the rest. Plenty of meat but you need to break it up to space it out. I was making it just for me, so I left some of the bigger chunks... with basamati rice and some chili crisp or siriacha - perfect! I was able to get 3 large meals out of it. I'm a fan of Kevin's products though - love that they don't have soy but still have flavor! If you look at the p

My favourite out of all the Ken's Meals.  Meat is tender with a mouthwatering Mongolian BBQ sauce packet.  Doesn't need any added seasonings, great right outta the box, after you thaw in fridge overnight, and heat it up to the appropriate temperature.
Delicious

title: Poor quality beef
text: The beef cuts in this were such poor quality, filled with sinew and gristle. I spit so many pieces that I just couldn’t chew down out. The texture was also very rubbery, they don’t have their sous vide process down well with this one. The flavor of the sauce was good but that was the only redeeming quality. Will not order again.

This is DELICIOUS . Hard to stop eating it is so good. Plenty for 2/3 servings.I’m never ordering just 1 again.Break it up really good or you may get a tough piece . More pieces more tender awesomeness

title: Gross
text: First thing I noticed is it’s only enough meat for one person, maybe 1.5 servings so it’s expensive. It tastes bad. Doesn’t taste like real beef. The meat isn’t tender and has a rubbery texture. Tastes almost like plant based beef. You’re better off just ordering takeout.

title: Delicious
text: Delicious; reviewer expected a texture issue but found the beef tender.

title: Delicious
text: Delicious. Super easy to make and quick too. Will buy again!

title: Tough Beef
text: This was a disappointment, the beef was tough and grisly. It was also a very small portion for two people. I'm not complaining about the portion, it's perfect for a s but f you n ed mire this isn't enough for a family. The sauce was ok nothing great. I'm nor going to buy this again because the meat was impossible to chew.

title: Incorrect weight.
text: Very misleading. Says 16 oz, but it is only 8.25 oz of meat (after draining the broth, per instructions) and 5.25 oz of gravy. That does not equal 16 oz, nor was it enough food for us. Expensive for not getting what is shown.

title: Positive review
text: Positive product feedback; criticism concerned Kroger pricing rather than product quality.

title: Convenient and tasty
text: I had this frozen for about 5 weeks? thawed it for ~15 hours, and prepared as directed. I started the pan with onions and garlic, only used 1/3 of the sauce packed at that was perfect. 3 servings? Eh. Barely. Very convenient and nutritious, though

title: Perfect quick make
text: Delicious. Quick and easy to make. Perfect over rice.

title: Awful
text: Chewy meat, zero flavor, turned my stomach for 12 hours

title: Gen z
text: For my everyday life working at a warehouse I usually have no time to cook my own food and this has helped tremendously! It’s not fancy by any means but it’s healthy and potent for what I require for manual labor! 9/10
Perfectly delicious Kevins meals great with rice or noodles. I over baked mine. Great value good quality.

title: Good meal but not near the size the box says
text: Love the meat and the taste but three times now I’ve bought the Teriyaki Beef. The box literally says 3 servings of 5oz. My wife and I have scraped the pan of every last bit and can only get one 5oz serving and one 4.2oz serving. Every time! This does NOT match their box and seems pretty much like false advertising as I’m buying it expecting 3 servings.

title: YUMMY!
text: I loved it and so did my family 🩷

title: Not much flavor to it
text: Not my favorite Kevin’s meals. I was actually pretty disappointed by the taste. I followed the cooking instructions but the meat itself had no taste and some of the pieces were chewy. I wouldn’t recommend unfortunately.

title: Quick, easy, delicious meal options!
text: I don't think people understand how you're supposed to prepare these meals. Anyone leaving a negative review didn't do it right. It's sous vide so already cooked- you just break the meat apart, pour out the juice in the packet. Pour the meat in a hot pan and SEAR. Then add the sauce or gravy. I also pre- sautéed mushrooms and added them in after I added the gravy. It was great and tender!
It’s just a raw meat and souce. Meet to cook from scratch. What’s the point then?
My favorite Kevin’s meal!

I enjoyed this product.  You never know if the beef is going to be like shoe leather.  It was tender and quick to prepare.  The sauce is very flavorful.  I warmed mine on the stove top to make sure I preserved the tenderness of the beef.  Would purchase again.  I have purchased several items of this brand and have not been disappointed.
I think they’ve missed the point of a prepared meal

title: Quick, easy, and delicious
text: Great texture and flavor

title: No thank you
text: This is the second time I tried Kevin’s . I was not happy with the taste this time or the last. We are not picky eaters. Both times we threw the product out.

title: Scam
text: Making it a point to leave a negative review for this product (not necessarily this flavor) on every platform. This is the second time I’ve purchased and weighed it on the scale before and after cooking. It’s not even 2 portions and the package says 3. It’s literally not even 10oz and it’s supposed to be 15. Complete scam and waste of money.

title: W
text: These meals were a game changer for my husband and me. With little time in the evening to cook this give us a way to creat a meal & still have done time to spend with each other. Also it is extremely Delicious. I

title: Positive review

title: Waste of money little portion.
text: This was so disappointing and a WASTE. 12.999 for 3 people? No this is enough for one person MAYBE 2. Do not buy if you’re going to feed a family of 3. 16oz was mostly sauce not meat.

title: 1/10 would not get again
text: Taste was bad and the beef was so tough

title: Not worth the money
text: Didn’t taste bad, but it was 11oz with the sauce and nowhere enough for 3 servings as it indicates, and barely enough for 2 people. For $9.99 I would not purchase again.

title: DUHlicious gluten free beef in gravy 🤤
text: I have a LOT of dietary restrictions, and I love Kevin's meals in general. They're perfect for when I need a tasty but quick dinner. I just tried this flavor, and I can't believe how tasty the gravy is! I browned sweet onions in the pan first--yum!

title: Avoid - rubbery beef
text: I’ve had this a few times and although it’s not a favorite of mine, it’s meh. **HOWEVER** - this last time I bought it, the meat was as others say a huge blob that would not break up no matter what I did. Even with a steak knife, the meat was super tough and I could not cook it properly. I had bought two and thought one was just a bad batch. Both were like this. I had to throw both away as I was very suspicious of the meat and was not about to get sick. Stick with Kevin’s chicken and AVOID this one. Even before, the meat is MEH at best.

title: Delicious
text: By reading the comments, I can tell people don’t understand what Sous vide is. The beef tastes great. I don’t use the entire sauce packet.

title: Too sweet
text: Too sweet and sugary taste, looks gross unprepared. Overpriced Kids didn’t like it

title: Delicious and soy-free
text: Delicious and soy-free. Its a little more than I’d like to pay, but it’s one of the few prepared meals I can find without soy

title: The BEST Easy, Healthy, Dinner Option!
text: My husband and I just discovered Kevin's and we're THRILLED with the ones we have tried so far. This one is my current favorite. It takes less than 15 minutes for me to make this dish and pair with some rice and broccoli for an easy beef and broccoli! I'd eat this every day if I could.

title: Odd texture
text: Did not like the texture of the meat. It did not taste like any meat that i have eaten before

title: Horrible, dog food I buy for my dog smells better.
text: This beef was low quality beef, tough and grisly. The gravy was unrecognizable as gravy. When I read the ingredients; there were things on the list that I never heard of putting in gravy. Give me a break! I will never buy this product again. I learned a lesson; read the ingredients before buying.

title: I dont think this is beef!
text: I agree with the other 1 star review. This DOES NOT LOOK OR TASTE LIKE BEEF. It’s tastes and looks like something extremely artificial. I just finished a few pieces and had to throw away the rest. I’m not trying to digest this and get the taste out of my mouth. Complete waste of money. Do not buy

title: Very tasty
text: Very tasty and the meat is tender.

title: Great flavor and texture!
text: I never eat frozen food due to the texture and taste but this blew me away! I froze it once i bought it since I wasn’t sure when I would eat it and even with thawing this was the absolute best premade meal I’ve had. The portion was large enough for me, my husband, and toddler. I made this on the stove and followed the instructions. Can’t really speak to this being prepared in a microwave.

title: Weird taste and texture...
text: I rarely leave reviews and unfortunately I do not leave reviews unless I am really, really annoyed! I DO NOT APPRECIATE IT WHEN I HAVE TO MAKE EXCUSES WHILE I AM EATING SOMETHING. The texture, the taste of this item leaves me NO DOUBT that this is NOT BEEF. I think that their description on the package is MISLEADING. Sous vide items do not have the texture of LEATHER and Weird aftertaste. I even found myself hoping that this is something BIOENGINEERED as opposed to WONDERING WHAT THIS THING IS MADE OF THAT IS TRYING TO PASS FOR BEEF. Do not waste your money or your time and do not roll the dic

title: Positive review
text: Positive overall experience.

title: Yum yum!
text: One of my favorite Kevin’s meals. I paired with bow tie pasta noodles and it was so good!

title: Eh
text: It's OK, not any better than a run of the mill frozen dinner. Overly sweet and just average.

title: Easy Paleo dinner solution!
text: An easy solution to being Paleo AND in a rush! So happy to discover it, I sautéed some mushrooms and onions with mine. It was great! My son loved this too -which was a great surprise (he skipped on the added veggies of course lol)

title: Recommend!
text: It’s very good! I normally pair it with white rice. It’s obviously not the same as homemade, but if you’re looking for a quick meal, then this is for you.

title: Loved it
text: Loved this. Put it over mashed potatoes. 🤤

title: Do not recommend
text: The meat was tough and flavorless

title: Picky eater(s) approved!
text: My house has some very picky eaters- this was a hit! Followed the instructions for searing the steak and it came out chewable & delicious!

title: Wh
text: I wouldn’t even give this a one star. It’s tough and I couldn’t even chew it. Terrible price don’t buy!

title: Tough and gross
text: I've loved the Kevin chicken meals but this was not the same. The meat was tough and inedible and tasted gross, the sauce didn't taste good, overall a waste of money.

title: I like it a lot
text: Quick and easy tastes really good!

title: Awesome!!!
text: Easy! Quick! Tasty! Going to be picking this up more regularly. Paired with air fried broccoli mixed in with the sauce and it was amazing.

title: Not edible
text: I like most of the Kevin’s meals but this one really disappointed me. I don’t know how to describe the meat taste but it tasted like it I was eating a solid and then powder in my mouth. It’s a slab of meat that you get to pull apart and then you cook. Even after dressing it with some chives and onions it still was not edible. I had to throw it away. Do not recommend at all.

title: Surprisingly fantastic!
text: This is going to be a regular occurrence!

title: Great Quick anf Easy Meal
text: Delicious! Makes 2 meals over rice for me and there is plenty of sauce. I suspect the person with the bad review did not drain the “sauce” from the meat before browning it. I had ZERO tough pieces of meat and there wasn’t any fat on the meat either. HIGHLY recommend.

title: Worth it!
text: Delicious! I followed the instructions about draining then browning meat first, then added in teriyaki sauce. So delicious! Enough sauce, which is normally not the case for prepackaged meals. Ate over veggies and there was enough sauce to cover veggies. Tomorrow will have with veggies and rice

title: Excellent, just follow directions :-)
text: Follow the directions and you’ll get nicely browned beef in plenty of tasty sauce! We ate it up so fast I didn’t get photos. Yes the beef looks a little unappetizing in the package but you’re supposed to brown it in a skillet. There’s enough sauce to thoroughly coat the beef and at least a cup or two of chopped veggies if you throw them in. We ate it on rice - delicious! It would go equally as well on cauliflower rice or noodles. Great convenience food for wheat allergy, celiac, and dairy allergy!

title: Easy to make and tastes pretty good!
text: This when cooked properly, considering that it's a packaged dish and not restaurant quality, was really tasty. I enjoyed it over rice with scallions. It was easy to make and quick. Tender beef. Very flavorful. I recommend for a quick easy meal with sides or to incorporate into another dish.

title: Gross
text: This looks extremely unappetizing. The beef is just one giant gray slab. There was a lot of liquid floating inside the plastic-wrapped package, which gives the impression that the packages of meat and sauce were leaky (probaby the beef, because the liquid was not dark). The instructions say to "massage" the meat apart in the package, but this is not effective. The sauce is just meh. The beef is sinewy and gross while also having a weird powdery texture. A Hot Pocket would be more appetizing than this and you could probably buy a dozen of them for the price.
